user.title: Price Data Source
user.description: Configure the entity that provides energy price data.

data_description.price_entity_id: Sensor entity whose attributes contain the price list (e.g. sensor.nordpool_kwh_be_eur_3).
data_description.price_attribute: Attribute name that holds the list of price entries (default: data).
data_description.start_key: Key inside each price entry that holds the slot start time (default: start).
data_description.price_key: Key inside each price entry that holds the price value (default: price).
data_description.injection_price_key: Key for the sell-back / injection price. Leave empty if not available.

battery.title: Battery Configuration
battery.description: Optional battery settings for SoC prediction and optimisation.

data_description.battery_entity_id: Number or sensor entity that reports the current State of Charge in %.
data_description.battery_size_kwh: Usable capacity of the battery in kWh.
data_description.roundtrip_loss_pct: Energy lost in a full charge-discharge cycle (default: 20 %).

error.invalid_entity: The selected entity does not exist in Home Assistant.

user.title: Price Data Source
user.description: Update the price data source configuration.

error.invalid_entity: The selected entity does not exist in Home Assistant.
